title_EN: Re: We need help
title_CHS: RE：我们需要帮助
content_EN:
>We're hiding in some ruins from the war, but our fuel is running low.

Eda,
You're in deep trouble. I saw the bounty on you and your friends before I even received your message.


I'll see what I can do with the injured man you mentioned, but I can make no promises with the equipment we have here.


The attachment includes updated coordinates for Guifang. There's been a lot of gang fights in the area recently, so we changed our orbit as a security measure. I trust that you can find us.


Dr. Rushell
Lumen Association, Head of Guifang Branch
content_CHS:
>我们现在躲在龙脉冲突的残骸区，油量几乎见底


艾妲，收到你们的消息了。
你问题真的惹大了，
信没寄到就看到黑帮对你的悬赏。


你提到的伤患，我会尽力帮你治疗，但只靠这种边境的医疗设备，能做多少事我也不知道。


附件是鬼方的新位置，这阵子地方帮派冲突很多，为了安全，我们改变了航道，你们要稍微找一下。


罗素医生 
龙脉协会鬼方支部长

title_EN: Don't tell anyone I did this for you
title_CHS: 别跟别人说我这样帮你
content_EN:
Eda,
This is your only option - assuming you can find the cave. I've attached directions to a nearby lumen cave registered under the association. The place produces rare medicinal herbs.


Since you're Red's pupil, you should be familiar with lumen plants. Find me a handful of Lira Cessami, it's an exceptionally rare plant that can repair cellular damage. Bring it back with the injured man and I'll figure something out.


To be clear, I shouldn't be giving this out to non-association members, even if you're Red's adopted daughter.


Dr. Rushell
Lumen Association, Head of Guifang Branch
content_CHS:
艾妲，这是唯一的方法了，
前提是，如果你有办法找到龙脉的话。
提供的方位附近有个协会登记的龙脉，出产蛮珍贵的药材。


你是红的徒弟，对龙脉植物不可能不熟吧。
去找「门兰芝」，那是种很稀有的龙脉植物，可以快速修补破损的组织，到时再带男人回来见我，我再想办法。


说真的，就算你是红的养女，我也不该对协会外的人提供这种情报，希望你早点放弃。


罗素医生 
龙脉协会鬼方支部长

title_EN: [Encrypted] Re: Eddie's lost it. She wants to find somewhere to launch a space burial!
title_CHS: 加密通讯：RE：姐姐疯了想找宇宙葬仪社
content_EN:
Remi, it appears you need me as much as I need you :)
You all are really making a mess out there, aren't you? Come on, how do you expect to find someone to launch a casket when you've got a bounty out on you?


Don't be mad at Eda. Maybe it's a sign that now's the time for us to be together. Come to my side and I'll tell you where to find a burial service.


Your love,
Benzel
Intel Broker <3
content_CHS:
菈米亚，又来找我啦
你们被抓得乱七八糟呢，红楼现在超红的呢，怎么可能找得地方愿意帮你们发射棺材啊？


别气你那姐姐了，我说不如啊，干脆趁现在当我的人吧？
然后我就会跟你說哪里有葬仪社。


情报贩子 爱你的斑鸠

title_EN: [Encrypted] Re: Re: Eddie's lost it. She wants to find somewhere to launch a space burial!
title_CHS: 加密通讯：RE：RE：姐姐疯了想找宇宙葬仪社
content_EN:
>>Come to my side and I'll tell you where to find a burial service.
>>Your love,
>>Benzel
>>Intel Broker <3

>Die.

Jokes aside, you really love your Eddie, huh? Alright, I'll tell you, but will you come have a drink with me already? Head to the infamous Silk Oasis, the black market bazaar. That's the main stomping grounds for the Myrian Ignis Guild. Shouldn't be too far from you guys.


There's a merchant there named Lamar. But you gotta be careful, they ain't friendly like me. Still, if you bring up my name they should be willing to help.


The most popular guy around,
Benzel
Intel Broker <3
content_CHS:
>>然后我就会跟你說哪里有葬仪社
>>情报贩子 爱你的斑鸠


>去死。


开不起玩笑耶你，就那么爱你家的那位姐姐就是。
好啦，就告诉你，下次记得陪我喝酒。
地点就是大名鼎鼎的「丝洲」非法卫星，
万道烛龙商会的大本营。
离你们没多少天文单位。


去找一位叫做「拉马」的商人。
自己小心点，他们可没我亲切。
但如果你搬出我斑鸠的名号，我想就会顺利不少。


情报贩子 人面广的斑鸠

title_EN: My dear runner friends
title_CHS: 给亲爱的探勘人伙伴
content_EN:
Revered and respected runners,

Are you sick of all those artifacts piling up on your ship? United Mining making up reasons to take your stuff? Can't get a foot in the underground market without getting tricked or hacked, nicked and whacked?


Well, you're in luck. We know that all an honest runner like yourself needs is to sell that crap you've got lying around. The Myrian Ignis Guild is just the partner you're looking for. We're the most reliable underground financier out there.


Your trusted Ignis merchant,
Lamar
content_CHS:
亲爱的龙脉探勘人

烦恼您手边积存的万道文物？痛苦矿联巧取豪夺您手边的资产？
交易诈骗，通讯黑客，想找地下金融却屡屡受骗？


我们知道您的需求，老实的您只想出售手边的文物。您的商会，万道烛龙将是最好的伙伴，最稳定的地下金融。


您的烛龙商人 拉马

title_EN: Pirate Boss 'Bones' Surrenders, Gets Suspended Sentence
title_CHS: 黑帮老大白牙自首，缓刑入狱！
content_EN:
Standard Time 6 Hrs. 3 Mins - Four years after establishing the Bones Brigade, the war hero known as 'Bones', turns himself in to the United Mining authorities.


The Bones Brigade, a traveling gang of pirates, had a hold on the asteroid belt's smuggling market for several years. Given that every attempt to arrest them proved unsuccessful, Bones' decision to turn himself in has boggled the minds of authorities, who are currently investigating the reason why.


Glory to the united. May fire and iron light the stars.
On Behalf of the Great Director Ironwind
content_CHS:
标准时间六时三分，过往的战争英雄白牙
成立白帮后四年，主动对矿联警备队自首


白帮为一猖獗多年的旅团，多年来占据小行星带的黑市走私贸易，屡次逮捕不力，本次突然自首，警备总局尚在调查原因。


天佑矿联 愿铁火于星辰闪耀
从属于伟大经理 铁岚

title_EN: Re: My dear runner friends
title_CHS: RE:给亲爱的探勘人伙伴
content_EN:
Well, did you find the cave? You keeping me waiting or what? You should know that the orbits are relatively empty at the moment. Perfect time for a space burial.


If you find it, head to the Ferry Point orbit launch station. I'll be there. I'll tell you right now, there ain't nowhere else to hold a burial.


Your trusted Ignis merchant,
Lamar
content_CHS:
怎，找到龙脉了吗？可等您等得心急啊。要知道这阵子轨道比较空，是举办宇宙葬的好时节。


找到的话，就来轨道抛射台「渡头」找我吧，
你需要举办葬礼的话，可没有别的地方办得到。


您的烛龙商人 拉马

title_EN: [Encrypted] Remi, you kiddin' me!?
title_CHS: 加密通讯：菈米亚，真假的
content_EN:
Endless lumen! Remi, oh Remi, for who my heart yearns! The bounty on you has been terminated?


Bones disappears, just like that? It appears that luck has struck from the deepest depths of the galaxy! My dearest Remi, you're not hiding anything from me, are you? Oh, no! Could it be? You and him, you — (System Blocked)—


Heavens above! How could you? What about Eda? What about... poor little Benzel?


Your one true love,
Benzel
Intel Broker <3


PS: You owe me a drink.
PPS: After the bounty expires you can go anywhere, right?
PPPS: To my side, for example.
content_CHS:
龙脉常在！我亲爱的准妻子菈米亚！
你们的通缉解除了？


白牙就这样消失了？这是走了几个光年的强运？
你是不是瞒着我什么？
难不成是你跟他—（系统屏蔽）—
不行！我的菈米亚怎么可以跟别人做这种事呢？你已经有你姐姐了！


伤心欲绝的，你的情报贩子，等你喝酒的 斑鸠


PS：通缉解除后，你们应该可以去很多地方了
PPS：像是来找我

title_EN: [Encrypted] Re: Re: Remi, you kiddin' me?!
title_CHS: 加密通讯：RE：RE：菈米亚，真假的
content_EN:
>>Your one true love,
>>Benzel
>>Intel Broker <3
>>PS: You owe me a drink.

>I don't have any intel to sell you. Die.

Ooooooo... spicy. One day you'll need me.


Patiently waiting,
Benzel <3
content_CHS:
>>>>伤心欲绝的，你的情报贩子，等你喝酒的 斑鸠


>>我没有可以卖你的消息，去死。


喔唔，你有一天会需要我的。
<3


放心的，等你的斑鸠

title_EN: [Encrypted] Re: Re: Re: Remi, you kiddin' me!?
title_CHS: 加密通讯：RE：RE：RE：RE：RE：菈米亚，真假的
content_EN:
>He needs to die!!!! Why won't you tell me where to hire an assassin!!!!

Relax, Remi. Think about it. Once he finds enough caves, he'll leave. Right?


Don't you ever say I don't love you. I've got some thirdhand intel for you right here. A gift for my angel. I heard it's overflowing with lumen. Like my love for you. If you find some Myrian treasure, he'll head back home the minute he can.


Still luv you,
Benzel <3


PS: If you find something, don't forget to gimme 70%.
PPS: Pretty sure it's only thirdhand.
content_CHS:
>>杀了我，杀了他，为什么不告诉我杀手的联络方式！ ！ ！


没事啦，菈米亚
仔细想想吗，不过就是等到找到够多龙脉，他就会离开了呀？


别说我不爱你，我这边有个转三手的情报，听说有满满的矿脉呢。
就免费给你，搞不好找到什么万道秘宝，他隔天就回国啦。


还是很爱你的 斑鸠

PS：如果找到什么，分我七成，别忘了。
PPS：应该只有三手吧。

title_EN: Jun, don't know what to say
title_CHS: 李莫我不知道该说什么
content_EN:
For the bastard Oceaner,
They want me to write a damned letter to ten people. What kind of a bull— (System Blocked)—rehabilitation program is this? Is United Mining run by a bunch of tossers?!


Point is, I didn't want to do this, yeah? Couldn't think of ten people, so I figured I'd take the piss outta you. After all, you pretend to be a nice bloke.


Oh yeah. Thanks for getting that bastard for my crew.


This message was sent from inmate 422 at the United Mining Correctional Facility.
Laurence White
content_CHS:
给混帐瀛海人
他们要我写信给十个家人，这是什么垃圾的更生培训过程？
矿联军方都智障吗？


总之，我不是特别要联络你，但我凑不出第十个，只好写来骂你这伪善的家伙。


喔对了
谢谢你帮我兄弟们复仇。


以上信息来自联合矫正所422号
罗伦斯・白

title_EN: Re: Don't tell anyone I did this for you
title_CHS: RE：别跟别人说我这样帮你
content_EN:
>This is my fault. 
>I want to do what I can to help, so we won't be going back to Guifang for now.

It's a shame, but you don't need to feel sorry for the Oceaner noble. As for those medicinal herbs you found, you'll be able to find somewhere to sell them.

Bounty's still out on you. Be careful.


Dr. Rushell
Lumen Association, Head of Guifang Branch
content_CHS:
>我认为又是我造成的。
>会尽量想帮帮他，暂时不会回去鬼方了。


虽然很遗憾，但你不用为瀛海贵族感到哀伤。取得的龙脉相关药种，你们可以找地方脱手。

你们悬赏还在，自己注意安全。


罗素医生 
龙脉协会鬼方支部长

title_EN: United Mining: Statement on Illegal Excavation
title_CHS: 行星矿业联合针对盗采声明
content_EN:
Due to the recent uptick in illegal excavation, United Mining has made an appeal to runners, stating that in accordance with the Lumen Mining Act, anyone who discovers a cave may keep the legal rights to it, so long as they pay 10% tax on the lumen.


For cave-related affairs, please report to the Lumen Association and do not attempt to sell stolen goods through illegal channels. Violators can face a prison sentence of up to 20 standard years.


Glory to the united. May fire and iron light the stars.
On Behalf of the Great Director Ironwind
content_CHS:
针对近日盗采频仍，行星矿业联合于此呼吁。
依据龙脉指定法，探勘人如果寻获龙脉，仅需缴交10%所得，即可合法取得龙脉开采权。


凡矿业事务请通报龙脉协会，切勿透过非法管道销赃，违者可处20标准年有期徒刑。


天佑矿联 愿铁火于星辰闪耀
从属于伟大经理 铁岚

title_EN: Bounty: Termination Announcement
title_CHS: 悬赏令：终止通告
content_EN:
Greetings, fellow people of the belt.
May Ignis shed light upon your good deeds.


Regarding bounty number #04332:


East Ocean noble, Jun
East Ocean guardian, Kay
Suspected Myrian witch, unknown
Suspected Peaker pilot, unknown


This bounty has been formally terminated. Please halt all related activities.


This announcement has been legally authorized by Bones, the leader of the respected Bones Brigade, and is issued by Mikai, a subsidiary officer of the Myrian Ignis Guild.
[See the attached certificate for verification]
content_CHS:
敬启 小行星的同胞大家好
愿烛龙光照，今日众善奉行


针对之前发布的通缉案# 04332


瀛海贵族 李莫
瀛海贵族亲卫 大魁
疑似万道女巫 姓氏不明
疑似群山船师 姓氏不明


已正式结案，请停止一切相关活动。


本通知由尊敬的白帮领袖，白牙合法授权。
转万道烛龙商会附属行政官 米凯 代理宣告。
电子签证为证。

title_EN: Re: About the East Ocean Lee clan report
title_CHS: RE：关于瀛海鸢家的报告
content_EN:
>>If you're willing to help
>>I would be extremely grateful

Noble, if you want to research your family, do it yourself. Don't go through the Lumen Association.


And if you're going to leave, do it quick and don't bring Eda into this.


Dr. Rushell
Lumen Association, Executive Secretary-General
content_CHS:
>>如果愿意帮忙
>>李莫由衷感谢


瀛海人，你想调查你的家族就自己去，
别透过我们龙脉协会。
你想离开就快，别动我们艾妲。


罗素医生
龙脉协会执行秘书长

title_EN: Re: Association Secret Mission Terminated
title_CHS: RE：协会秘密任务中止
content_EN:
>I'm fine. My thanks to the association's team of lawyers for helping us resolve the issue.

The council was willing to help because you saved that Ironwind immigration convoy.


Unfortunately, I haven't received any news from the client. The last message sent read: "For love." I couldn't tell if he was hinting at revolution or if they were his last words. This informant helped us a lot with United Mining, and fought for the rights of Peakers, so we're worried about him.


If I receive further news, I'll tell you.
I hope you don't further involve yourself with Banshee.
content_CHS:
>都没事了，谢谢协会的律师团与沟通。


是因为你们曾经拯救铁岚城移民团，市议会说情帮了很多。


遗憾是委托人没了消息。
最后的信息是「为了爱」，不知道是革命的信号还是绝笔。

这位线人为我们跟矿业联合协调，争取群山民间无数权力，我担心他的安危。


如果未来还有消息，我会再通知你。
但我希望，你不要插手黑龙相关的任何事了。

title_EN: Re: Re: Association Secret Mission Terminated
title_CHS: RE：RE：协会秘密任务中止
content_EN:
>>I hope you don't further involve yourself with Banshee.

>I'm the Red Chamber's witch. I'll make decisions for myself.

Sounds like something Red would say. 
You always reminded me of her.
content_CHS:
>>你不要插手黑龙相关的任何事了。


>我是红楼的女巫，我会自己作主。


是吗，讲话跟红一样。
你总是让我想起她。

title_EN: United Mining Spaceway Changes, Asteroid Belt Residents Take Note
title_CHS: 矿业联合航道变更，小行星带的住民请注意
content_EN:
Greetings, fellow people of the belt.
May Ignis shed light upon your good deeds.


Based on information provided by the Myrian Ignis Guild, the orbit of United Mining's border sentry station has been frequently changing, so the risks of flying through have increased significantly.


If any ships have to pass through, make sure that your vessel crew has a forged United Mining visa.
content_CHS:
敬启 小行星的同胞大家好
愿烛龙光照，今日众善奉行

依据万道烛龙商会提供的信息指出，矿业联合的边境哨站近期内轨道频繁更动，移动风险升高。


若有通航需求，
请确保船队持有伪造的矿业联合签证。

title_EN: Lumen Mining Act 6th Anniversary Press Conference
title_CHS: 龙脉指定法六周年说明会
content_EN:
(Unity News reporting from Ironwind)

Today is the 6th anniversary of the Lumen Mining Act. Thanks to this new law, lumen trade in Thousand Peaks has hit a new sector record and will soon apply to be recognized as a United Mining exemplary economic zone.


As such, the Ironwind Council of Commerce has decided to initiate the first-ever amendment in the hopes of creating a prosperous future for the residents of Thousand Peaks.

Related matters will be addressed at a press conference held at the Lumen War Memorial.


Glory to the united. May fire and iron light the stars.
On Behalf of the Great Director Ironwind
content_CHS:
（统合新闻记者于铁岚城报导）

本日为龙脉指定法六周年纪念，透过新法的制定，龙脉贸易于今日的群山地区达到星区内的高峰。
即将申请成为矿业联合的示范经济区。


针对现状，铁岚城行星商业议会决定进行初次的修法，希望成就与群山民间共存共荣的愿景。

相关事项将于冲突纪念馆举办相关记者会进行说明。


天佑矿联 愿铁火于星辰闪耀
从属于伟大经理 铁岚

title_EN: Civilians Oppose United Mining Plan to Amend the Lumen Mining Act
title_CHS: 矿联研拟龙脉指定法修正案，引起民间反弹
content_EN:
(The Daily Lumen reporting from Ironwind)

Concerning the first proposed amendment to the Lumen Mining Act:

Reliable sources indicate that there's a high probability the tax on exporting raw lumen will increase. The Lumen Association has emphasized that this amendment will most likely break the longstanding trust between civilians and Ironwind.


The Lumen Mining Act is a special law that was formulated by United Mining after the war:

The Lumen Association was commissioned to advance this law, which stipulates that besides officially registered caves, all individuals must do to legally obtain unrestricted mining rights is to register with United Mining and pay a tax of 10% on all profits resulting from cave-related investments.


The Daily Lumen is your unbiased news source of the Peaks, and is committed to upholding standards of objectivity and neutrality.
content_CHS:
（龙脉日报记者于铁岚城报导）

针对近日的龙脉指定法修法一案：

据可靠消息指出，有极高的机会调高汜原物料的出口税率，龙脉协会强调，本修正案极可能破坏长久以来民间与矿联的信赖关系。


「龙脉指定法」来自于矿业联合战后的特别法律：

委托授权由龙脉协会推动，条文明订除了官方登记的矿脉之外，任何人只要与矿业联合登记，并上缴百分之十的龙脉投资利润，便可合法拥有自由的采矿权利。


龙脉日报秉持中立，为群山地区的最客观公正地方报。

title_EN: Public Security in Shambles, Hopes for Special Law Addressing Witches
title_CHS: 治安乱象频出，盼女巫另立专法
content_EN:
(Unity News reporting from Ironwind)

Statistics provided by the Council of Commerce indicate that pirates have begun purchasing retired lumen seeking vessels in bulk and cooperating with wandering witches, causing a significant rise in illegal excavation and endangering border tourists, creating a major public security issue.


The council has already set up an academic conference to address this issue. The chairman points out that as Thousand Peaks becomes the center of interstellar trade, to protect the rights of civilians and runners, they won't exclude the possibility of drafting new laws that will adjust the civil rights of witches.


Glory to the united. May fire and iron light the stars.
On Behalf of the Great Director Ironwind
content_CHS:
（统合新闻记者于铁岚城报导）

据行星商业议会统计指出，
近年来黑帮利用批次收购退役的龙脉探测船，跟流亡的女巫合作，导致各种盗矿层出不穷，甚至危及边境旅客，成为治安问题的最大宗。


行星商业议会已成立学者会议探讨此问题，
议长指出，在群山成为星际贸易中心的成长过程，为维护探勘人与民众的权益，不排除研拟专法，调整女巫的公民权。


天佑矿联 愿铁火于星辰闪耀
从属于伟大经理 铁岚

title_EN: Glory to the united. May fire and iron light the stars.
title_CHS: 天佑矿业联合，愿铁火于星辰闪耀
content_EN:
Commemorating the 6th Anniversary of United Mining's Victory in the Lumen War.


To recreate the grand parades held on the Day of Glorious Remembrance 6 years ago, the flaming hammer parade will be held on the 32nd at 5 hours, East Mount Immanis time, kicking off at Iron Stars City Square.

The chairman for the Ironwind Council of Commerce, the Lumen Association president, and other important dignitaries will participate in this great ceremony.


Glory to the united. May fire and iron light the stars.
On Behalf of the Great Director Ironwind
content_CHS:
纪念矿联龙脉冲突胜利六周年。


为重现当年光荣纪念日游行盛况，铁火大锤将于大东山三十二标准日五时，于铁火星辰广场起驾。

铁岚城行星商业议会议长，龙脉协会会长，各界重要人士也将前往，共襄盛举。


天佑矿联 愿铁火于星辰闪耀
从属于伟大经理 铁岚

title_EN: Re: Lumen Mining Application Process
title_CHS: RE：龙脉指定法申请概略
content_EN:
> Thanks so much for your help. 

Dear Red Chamber Crew, 
Whoever wishes to register must have the following information as well as register at the Ironwind Cave Verification Bureau:

- Cave location data 
- Perfect starsong from the cave 
- Lumen Association ID (Expired)
- The cave must be in legal airspace 


Please note, the number of caves that are designated to the Red Chamber exceeds the limit allowed by law, so the application may take longer than usual. If you'd like, we could open a special case for the Red Chamber.


Fey Lin
Lumen Association, Cave Development Office
content_CHS:
> 谢谢您的帮忙。

敬爱的红楼船队
登记人必须持有下述，并且向铁岚城龙脉认证保护局登记

-龙脉的位置信息
-龙脉的完整龙鸣
-龙脉协会探勘人证明（过期）
-龙脉必须处于合法的领空


必须声明，您目前拥有的龙脉资格已超出管理配额，申请时间可能会提高，若有兴趣，我们可以为您打造红楼专案。

龙脉协会 矿脉推动局 林方

title_EN: Re: Red Chamber Interview Draft
title_CHS: RE：红楼船队专访特辑草稿
content_EN:
>>"I'm looking for my master, she's a great witch."
>>The first time I met Captain Eda of the Red Chamber, she didn't hide the fact that she was a witch.

>>"I know the Peakers hate us. But runners just need to trust in themselves and do a good job."
>>Eda has a petite stature, but she speaks resolutely. It feels as if her eyes can see right through your soul.

>>Who would've thought that this was the crew leader who discovered the largest Myrian ruin in the last two years and was given the Honorable Runners Award?

>>Following Eda was her attendant who served as both pilot and technician.
>>Earnest and welcoming, she spoke with confidence in front of the witch.

>>The other crewman was an East Oceaner mercenary. According to the technician,
>>they'd rescued him from the clutches of some pirates. From then on he'd become their servant.

>Please ignore what Remi said during the interview, Jun is not a slave.

OK.
PS: We'll adjust the witch part a little.


The Daily Lumen Reporter
Horden (Feel free to get in touch anytime.)
content_CHS:
>>「我是在寻找我的师父，她是个伟大的女巫。」
>>第一次见到红楼船队时，船长艾妲，并不忌讳她为女巫的身份。

>>「我知道群山人讨厌我们，但探勘人只要相信自己，做出成绩就好，」
>>身材娇小的她，说话坚定，乌黑的眼眸仿佛能看穿你的灵魂。

>>怎么能想像，这会是这两年来，发现最大万道遗迹，并且成为荣誉探勘人的船队领袖呢？

>>跟随她的是一位随从，技师兼船师，
>>稳重大方的她，在女巫面前侃侃而谈。

>>另一位是来自瀛海的雇佣兵，据技师所说，
>>她们将他从海盗的手中拯救出来，从此成为她们的下仆。


>请无视菈米亚访谈时的话，李莫不是奴隶


好的
PS. 女巫的部分我们会略有调整
龙脉日报记者  火旦（欢迎随时联系）

title_EN: Uninhibited Seekers: The Red Chamber Crew Interview
title_CHS: 不羁的追寻者，红楼船队专访特辑
content_EN:
(The Daily Lumen's interview with Red Chamber)

"You must believe in yourself. Before searching for lumen, first search your soul. In the end, you will find the lumen that you're looking for."


That's Eda. She has a petite stature, but she speaks resolutely. It feels as if her eyes can see right through your soul.


Who would've thought that this was the crew leader who discovered the largest Myrian ruin in the last two years and was given the Honorable Runners Award?


Following her was a girl who worked as both the pilot and technician. The other member of the crew was a young East Oceaner mercenary and runner. This tiny crew's meteoric rise has made them the idols for the younger generation of Aurora...


Lumen of the Peaks, flow without end.
The Daily Lumen is your unbiased news source of the Peaks, and is committed to upholding standards of objectivity and neutrality.
content_CHS:
（龙脉日报记者于红楼专访）

「你必须相信自己，在探勘龙脉前，先探勘自己的内心」
「最后你就会找到龙脉」


她是艾妲，身材娇小的她，说话坚定，乌黑的眼眸仿佛能看穿你的灵魂。


怎么能想像，这会是这两年来，发现最大万道遗迹，并且成为荣誉探勘人的船队领袖呢？


跟随她的是一位技师兼船师，还有来自瀛海的雇佣兵，年轻的探勘人，奇迹似窜红的迷你船队，三人已经成为朝山地区所有年轻人的偶像...


群山龙脉，川流不止，
龙脉日报秉持中立，为群山地区的最客观公正地方报。

title_EN: Letter of Gratitude from Ironwind Immigration Convoy
title_CHS: 来自铁岚城商业移民团的感谢信
content_EN:
Dear Red Chamber Crew,

This is Tau'r, crew leader for Ironwind Immigration Convoy No. 328.


Thanks to the help of the Red Chamber Crew, the lives of all 1,372 passengers aboard the immigration vessel were saved.


I pray that the flaming hammer continues to illuminate your journey.


We wish you smooth running. May fire and iron light the stars.
content_CHS:
敬爱的红楼船队

这里是铁岚城商业移民团328号，我是领队托尔。

谢谢红楼船队的协助，全移民船的一千三百七十二人的性命，是由您所赐予。


愿行星的铁火大锤荣耀您的矿脉之行。
愿探勘顺利，铁火于星辰闪耀。

title_EN: Application for Mining Rights: Red Chamber Crew
title_CHS: 龙脉开发所有权申请：船队「红楼」
content_EN:
Audit Number: 30401
Applicant: Red Chamber Crew
Your application is currently being processed by the association's lawyers.


Details:
02 Lumen Ziggurat: Red Chamber, discovered in 8534 
- In the process of applying for preservation under the Lumen Association.

03 Lumen Cave: Red Chamber, discovered in 8534 
- In the process of applying for preservation under the Lumen Association.

04 Lumen Cave: Red Chamber, discovered in 8535
- Ironwind Cave Verification Bureau first-round audit has passed


Please make sure to preserve this letter and case code for verification purposes. The Lumen Association fully complies with the Lumen Mining Act, and is the only organization in Thousand Peaks that can legally register civilian caves.

审核字号：30401
受文者：船队「红楼」
您所申请的数据正交由协会律师处理中


说明：
龙脉02 万道风引所「红楼」，发现于8534

- 龙脉协会申请保护中

请妥善保留本信件与发文字号，以供查核之需。
龙脉协会谨遵龙脉指定法，为群山地区唯一合法登记民间矿脉组织。

title_EN: Warning: Excavation Conflicts
title_CHS: 探勘冲突警告
content_EN:
Recently, distress reports for runner ships have been on the rise.


Reliable sources indicate that ever since the Red Chamber discovered the ancient Myrian remains known as the Lumen Ziggurat, Ironwind military activity has continued to rise. We advise runners to not go near military bases or cave airspace that belong to Ironwind.


The Lumen Association fully complies with the Lumen Mining Act, and is the only organization in Thousand Peaks that can legally register civilian caves.
content_CHS:
近日探勘船，落难登记数量攀升中


据可靠消息指出，自从红楼商船发现古万道遗迹：
代号：万道风引所「红楼」 之后，
铁岚城的军事探勘活动持续攀升，请探勘成员不要随意接近军事据点，或铁岚城所属矿脉空域。


龙脉协会谨遵龙脉指定法，为群山地区唯一合法登记民间矿脉组织。

title_EN: Lumen Association Excavation Permit Renewal
title_CHS: 龙脉协会探勘人证明更新
content_EN:
Dear leader of the Red Chamber Crew, Edalune Grant:


It's been one year since you've joined the association. Your excavation permit has been renewed as of today. Please preserve the attached electronic certificate.


The Lumen Association fully complies with the Lumen Mining Act, and is the only organization in Thousand Peaks that can legally register civilian caves.
content_CHS:
亲爱的红楼船队
领队 艾妲拉姆・葛兰特


距离您入会已经一个标准年，您的执照已于本日更新完成，请妥善保管此电子签证。


龙脉协会谨遵龙脉指定法，为群山地区唯一合法登记民间矿脉组织

title_EN: Re: Heading to Banshee soon
title_CHS: RE：即将前往黑龙
content_EN:
>We're heading out right now.

It seems you won't listen. 

If you find her, give her hell for me.
I'll be in Guifang, waiting for your return.

You're different from that unruly woman.
content_CHS:
> 我们现在立刻出发。


我劝不了你，如果你追到她，帮我骂她。
我会在鬼方等你的故事，你要回来找我。
你跟那任性的家伙不一样。

title_EN: Re: Re: My journey will soon come to an end
title_CHS: RE：RE：我的旅行快到终点了
content_EN:
>>You crazy? Writing to me while I'm on a mission?!
>>Relax. Ain't no way that's Banshee.
>>Even if you were Helius incarnate, no way you'd find it before my team.

> If all goes well, I'll be leaving the Red Chamber crew soon.

C'mon boy, what's stopping you, yeah? Just take the girl with you. Before you leave, remember to stop by and I'll buy you a pint, ya witch loving fool.


Lawrence White
content_CHS:
>>你是有病才寄信给正在执行任务的我吗？
>>放心吧，你那不可能是黑龙
>>你乙皇再世也不可能比我的调查团先找到


> 如果真的顺利，我迟早得离开红楼船队。


李莫妈，你有什么好不舍的，把她带走不就好了。
走前别忘了来找我，我请你喝一杯，醉死你这被女巫迷住的蠢货。


罗伦斯・白

title_EN: Thousand Peaks Standard SOS Signal
title_CHS: 群山标准求救讯号
content_EN:
23ld9W_23... DLCI344000...

Region:
Veteran's Abode: Guifang, West Mount Tonitrus orbit

Coordinates: 6.681, 4.1°b, 117.16°l
content_CHS:
23ld9W_23...DLCI344000...

所在区域：
后冲突军人之家「鬼方」轨道「西雷山」空域

座标解析：6.681, 4.1°b, 117.16°l

title_EN: Re: [Urgent] Looking for United Mining vocalizer battery
title_CHS: RE：[急] 求矿联军用品，军用发声器电池
content_EN:
>Didn't Bones ask you to help?
>Show us what you got, buddy.

Ignis above, do you know how hard it is to find devices that witches use? The battery in that thing is a damn antique.


But I did it for Bones, and I found one anyway.


You can find one at Trash Mountain. It's a space station that specializes in taking apart United Mining vessels. But I have to tell you, that area was a major part of the Lumen War, so most of the folks there are retired Ring veterans.


If they see that lumen seeking vessel, all they're gonna see is the ship of their sworn enemy. Don't matter if it's new or used, they'll point all the damn space torpedos at you. Better keep the comm lines open, or you're gonna get shot down in a hot minute.


Your trusted Ignis merchant,
Lamar
content_CHS:
>白牙不是要你们帮忙？
>商人最守信用，拿出你们的信誉让我们看看。


烛龙在上，那种女巫用的发声辅具知道有多难找？军用发声器的电池， 那是古董货啊。


看在白牙的分上，找是找到了...


在一个叫做「垃圾山」，专门解体矿联船的空间站，先说，那一带过去是龙脉冲突的重点区域，大部分人都是以前星环自由战线退下的士兵。


看到死对头矿联的龙脉探测船，管他二手还新品出厂，可能鱼雷都会对准你。建议通讯频道开好，不然可等着被击沉了。


您的烛龙商人 拉马

title_EN: For the Brigade's benefactors, the Red Chamber Crew
title_CHS: 给亲爱的白帮恩人，红楼船队
content_EN:
By the light of Ignis, Myria everlasting.

-----------------------
VIP ID 03212 Red Chamber Crew
Your container has passed through the interstellar transport station. Thank you for supporting the Myrian Ignis Guild.
-----------------------


Ignis above, your casket got through without a hitch. As for Trash Mountain's processing fees, I'll waive 'em this time. Don't be mistaken, I do business to make credits.


You seem like decent people, you hear? Bones likes you, so I figured I'd... let's call it an investment. Best of luck. Remember what I did when ya make it big.


Your trusted Ignis merchant,
Lamar
content_CHS:
烛龙在上，万道日常

-----------------------
VIP ID 03212 红楼商船队
您的活体货柜已通过传送港
感谢您对万道烛龙商会的支持。
-----------------------


烛龙在上，你们的棺材顺利过关，
至于仲介垃圾山的手续费，这次就算了。
别误会，我不做亏本生意的，

只觉得你们怎么看也不是坏人，
白老大又看好你们，我就投资点吧。
加油点，赚了大钱别忘了我。


您的烛龙商人 拉马

Your lumen plant tending service for the following property expires today:


United Mining Sector 2
New Iran - Area 692 - No. 3101

We have automatically renewed your plan. If you wish to terminate the service, please notify us within 7 days. We wish you a pleasant journey among Thousand Peaks.


Come join New Iran! Developed by United Mining, it's the friendliest immigration sector in the Galactic Empire.

您于行星矿业联合第二星区，

title_EN: [The Daily Lumen] Curtains Rise for the Final Act of the Melody of Starsong
title_CHS: [龙脉日报]龙脉长歌三部曲，终章开演
content_EN:
(This article is sponsored by the Thousand Peaks Performing Arts Foundation)
(Provided by the Melody of Starsong performance crew)

The final act of the three-act opera entitled "Melody of Starsong", written by the playwright Rodin, will soon be showcased at the Thousand Peaks Culture Foundation.


"May my soul find companionship with the stars, that we may meet again in the next life." Will the story of Helius and Terra come to a happy ending?


Melody of Starsong is an opera based on the stories found in Myrian myths. It strives to promote the beauty of Thousand Peaks culture and art.


Lumen of the Peaks, flow without end.
The Daily Lumen is your unbiased news source of the Peaks, and is committed to upholding standards of objectivity and neutrality.
content_CHS:
（本新闻由群山表演艺术基金会 赞助）
（龙脉长歌公演筹备组 提供）

由剧作家罗登所撰写的龙脉长歌三部曲
最终章近日将于群山艺术基金会，盛大开演


「愿我的灵魂与星辰为伴，来世再遇」
乙皇与后土的故事，是否能有美好的结局

龙脉长歌为借用万道神话故事改编的歌剧，
旨在推广万道文化与艺术之美好。


群山龙脉，川流不止，
龙脉日报秉持中立，为群山地区的最客观公正地方报。

title_EN: Re: Lumen Association Application Case #10032
title_CHS: RE：龙脉协会申请案件编号10032
content_EN:
>Application Status: Rejected
>Reason: Review postponed by the evaluation committee

Eda,
The association has received your application. It's true, you and your crew have explored a few caves. Based on the association's policies, you are qualified to join.


But as a good friend of your master, there are some things I can't agree to that easily.


If you have a problem with that, I'll be in Guifang.

Also, there's been a rise in piracy in the airspace around us. For the sake of safety, Guifang has re-encoded its signal. You'll need to reanalyze it. 


Dr. Rushell
Lumen Association, Head of Guifang Branch
content_CHS:
>>审核结果：不通过
>>原因：评议会内部审查暂缓


艾妲
协会有收到你们的申请书，的确，你们已经探索了数个龙脉，照规矩，你们是有加入协会的资格。


但作为你师父的好友，有些事我不能轻易答应。


还有问题的话，自己来鬼方找我，

最近空域海盗很多，为了安全，
我们修改了电磁讯号，红楼会需要重新解析。


罗素医生 
龙脉协会鬼方支部长

title_EN: Re: Re: Lumen Association Application Case #10032
title_CHS: RE：RE：龙脉协会申请案件编号10032
content_EN:
I shouldn't have said that. Every time Red is brought up, I can't control myself. You two are too damn stubborn.


I've attached some intel that's surrounded with rumors. People claimed to have seen the cave, but the radars aren't picking up anything. I know you'll be interested.


Let me be clear. This has not been certified by the association, but I thought you might want to test your luck.


Dr. Rushell


PS: Stay safe. As for the application, I'll consider it.
content_CHS:
我可能说太过份了，每次只要提到红，我就会控制不了。
你们都太任性了。


附件是最近谣言很多的情报，有人传言有目击龙脉，但雷达是没有反应。
我知道你会在意。


先说，不是协会认证的官方消息，我只是刚好听到，随你们赌运气。


罗素医生
PS. 自己注意安全，关于申请的事情，我会考虑。

title_EN: Re: Re: Re: Re: Your sentence can be reduced by serving in the military
title_CHS: RE：RE：RE：RE：刑期可以透过服役减免。
content_EN:
>>>You should seriously consider it.
>>>Jun

>>Bastard! Ain't no way I'm serving for a reduced sentence!
>>How many times you gonna write me with this crap?
>>You want me back in United Mining? Bug off!

>>Who cares how many years I can shave off. They turned their backs on the crew. Why would I help them?
>>I'd rather fly a ship right into their damn base than go back and work for them!

>Seriously. You should consider it. Your skills could be put to better use.

Even if they locked me up for 20 years, I still wouldn't take it. Musta been mad writing to you!


This message was sent from inmate 422 at the United Mining Correctional Facility.
Laurence White
content_CHS:
>>>>你该认真考虑看看
>>>>李莫


>>混帐，我不会考虑用服役交换刑期！
>>你老妈子要写同样的东西给我几次？
>>要我回到矿联军方？算了吧！


>>管他能减刑几年，那些人放弃了我的兄弟，我凭什么帮他？
>>叫我回去服役，信不信我直接开飞船直接撞进军营？


>你该考虑，你的才能该用在更好的地方。


关我二十年也不接受，我是疯了才跟你来信！


以上信息来自联合矫正所422号
罗伦斯・白

title_EN: Re: Re: Found info on Banshee
title_CHS: RE：RE：找到跟黑龙有关的消息了。
content_EN:
>>Got some Banshee info. Come back to Guifang ASAP.

>Eddie's too busy to check her messages
>But we're on the move, we'll head back immediately!

Tell her to stop caring about the Oceaner boy so much.


Dr. Rushell
Lumen Association, Executive Secretary-General
content_CHS:
>>有黑龙消息，马上来鬼方。


>姐姐没空收信
>但我们刚好在路上，马上就会过去！


叫她别那么在意那个瀛海人。


罗素医生
龙脉协会执行秘书长

title_EN: Personnel Transfer Notification
title_CHS: 人事异动令
content_EN:
Date Sent: 8535/09/30 Galactic Calendar
Status: Urgent


Formerly head of the association's Guifang branch, Rushell Moore has been promoted to the position of Executive Secretary-General for her help resolving cave issues between United Mining and the people.


She will now be responsible for operational management, intel development and cave expansion for all caves in the Thousand Peaks region.


The above position transfer is effective immediately.
content_CHS:
发文日期：银河历8535/09/30
速别：急件


原龙脉协会鬼方支部长 罗素・莫尔 
由于协助处理民间与矿联官方的矿脉纠纷得宜，
调任龙脉协会执行秘书长，
负责全群山地区龙脉之营运管理，情报开发，以及矿脉拓展。


以上职务异动，自即日起生效。

title_EN: Re: How is it in the military?
title_CHS: RE：军队服役的日子还行吗？
content_EN:
>Really happy to hear you're back in the service and giving back to society.
>Jun

Yeah. Life in the service is like clockwork. Sleep early, get up early, three hot meals a day.


You're one annoying brat, you know that? They gave me a little crew here at United. There's some dodgy noble who acts all pompous and crap. Reminds me of you. Good thing he's not from East Ocean or I'd give him a good beating.


Anyway, I've been pretty busy recently. Since the security clearance for this mission is the highest possible, I can't use standard communication during the operation.
Next time I contact you, it'll be about half a standard year later.


You take care,
Lawrence White
content_CHS:
>听到你回头服役，回报社会真的很开心
>李莫


对啦，李莫妈，服役的生活很规律，早睡早起都有吃饭。


混帐，你真的很烦。
矿联军方派给了我一支小队，里面还有伪善的贵族公子，让我一直想到你。
对，只差他不是瀛海人，否则我一定修理他。


总之，最近我会忙了点。
因为任务保密程度是最高，出任务期间，规定是无法使用一般通讯。
下次联络你，大概也是半标准年后了。


你自己保重
罗伦斯・白

title_EN: [Encrypted] Re: I know a pretty good restaurant
title_CHS: 加密通讯：RE：我知道一间不错的餐厅
content_EN:
>Eddie wants to run off with that guy.

This is just too much.
Endless lumen! I can't describe how much this hurts that my romantic rival is about to leave, I've lost my purpose...!


But it'll be okay Remi, let me console you.


Even though you responded to my date proposal 6 months late, I know you didn't mean it.


Broken hearted,
Benzel <3


PS: That restaurant I mentioned appears to have gone out of business. How about this one? 
PPS: Can we pay separately?
content_CHS:
>>姐姐要跟男人跑了。


这真的太难过了。
龙脉常在，我难以形容我的悲痛，就好像少了一个宿敌，我能有什么目标…
但没关系，让我安慰你吧，菈米亚。


虽然你晚了六个标准月才回应我的约会，不过我懂，你只是不好意思而已。


心疼的斑鸠

PS：我说的那间餐厅好像倒了，不如你考虑另外这间？
PPS：可以各付各的吧。

title_EN: Association Secret Mission Briefing
title_CHS: 矿联机密任务情报
content_EN:
Dear Eda,
You'll have to go into United Mining airspace for this mission. Since you aren't an Ironwind citizen they won't be easy on you. If you encroach on military airspace, they might even shoot you down.


Even if Remi can evade United Mining's spaceways, I suggest you upgrade Red Chamber's signal modifier.

Take care of yourself. Don't do anything that would make Red sad. 


Dr. Rushell
Lumen Association, Executive Secretary-General
content_CHS:
亲爱的艾妲
这次的任务会要你们进入矿联管辖的空域，很容易被刁难，如果误入军用空域，甚至有被击毁的风险。


就算菈米亚有能力避开矿联的航线，建议你们还是改装红楼的讯号变造系统。

自己小心点，别做让红伤心的事。

罗素医生
龙脉协会执行秘书长

title_EN: Re: Wasn't Banshee
title_CHS: RE：不是黑龙
content_EN:
>Waste of time, the mission failed, and Jun almost died
>Eda

Dear Eda,
Don't throw a fit when things don't go your way. You're just like Red.


I've got bad news. Not sure if it's because you were discovered, but United Mining knows that someone is intercepting their messages. A few people have been interrogated and their communication channels have been turned off.


The good news is that the client tracked down the last message from the Banshee Expedition. For his safety, he doesn't want us to keep any records of our communication.


Head to the capital of Thousand Peaks, Ironwind, where you'll find the Lumen War Memorial. He'll meet you there.


Attached are coordinates to Ironwind and a media pass. You won't be able to get in without it.
content_CHS:
>白跑了一趟，任务失败，而且还差点害死李莫
>艾妲


亲爱的艾妲
别生气就闹别扭，坏毛病跟红一样。


我们有坏消息，不知道是不是因为你们被发现，矿联军方察觉有人拦截他们的消息，好几个人被盘查，联系用的频道也被关了。


听起来很糟，但好消息是，委托人有追踪到黑龙调查团最后的情报，但为了安全，他希望这次不要跟他有通联纪录。


你可能需要走一趟群山首府「铁岚城」，那里有一座冲突纪念馆，他会在那里跟你面会。


附件是「铁岚城」的位置
还有媒体证，没有它你进不去的。

title_EN: Banshee Expedition: Mission Briefing
title_CHS: 黑龙探索队任务准备书
content_EN:
>Classified
>For internal use only

Sender: 13923-ERROR433- Encrypted
File created on: 8535/0905/032134 Galactic Calendar


Preparations for the Banshee Expedition are complete and is expected to set out at 41200, United Mining standard time.


Location: Asteroid 99, Lumen Cave
Expected arrival time: Unknown


Vessels: 2 Destroyers, 5 Frigates, 2 Lumen Seeking Vessels
Mission Risk Level: High
Mission Target: Weapons expropriation and technological research


Glory to the united. May fire and iron light the stars.
content_CHS:
>极密件
>仅供内部使用


寄件人：13923-ERROR433-加密处理
建档日期：银河历8535＼0905＼032134


黑龙调查团的相关筹备已经完成，
预定于矿联标准时41200时启航


地点小行星-龙脉-99
预计抵达时间 不明


船体配置：驱逐舰两艘，游击艇五艘，
龙脉探测船两艘
任务危险度：高
任务目标：武器征收与技术研究。


天佑矿联 愿铁火于星辰闪耀

title_EN: [Encrypted] Re: Benzel, help! Let me use your comms system. I need to contact the military
title_CHS: 加密通讯：RE：斑鸠救命，给我你的通讯阀权限，我要跟军方联络
content_EN:
>It's you! I know it's you!!!
>Encrypt this message and send it to the United Mining vessel at 33.850, -2.03°b, 320.37°l

>Then, you gotta help me find the vessel of the ex-Bones Brigade leader. Don't care how, just do it!
>If you do, I'll think about coming to see you!!!

My dearest Remi,

You can't escape this time. And if you do... I'll keep trying anyway.


Come on now, I'm risking my life to let you call a military hotline through my comms system!


I don't know how you feel about it, but my loviest love of all loves... I'm the one you're waiting for. Oh, how I love you! Unwavering and without end! What a poor soul I...


Ah, screw it. 
Just date me.


Richard Mers III
Chairman of the Ironwind Trade Council
content_CHS:
>>就是你！我知道是你
>>给我把这个信息加密传给矿联位于33.850, -2.03°b, 320.37°l的船队

>>然后想办法找出前白帮头头的那艘什么方法都可以，总之做！
>>我就考虑见你一面！


亲爱的菈米亚

这次你不能躲了，不然我就拔光我羽毛。
拜托，透过我的通讯阀跟军队的热线沟通，这件事简直是赌上我的命哪。


我不知道你怎么想，但你知道，我的爱，我就是那你一直等的人。

爱你的 斑鸠 死心塌地的 斑鸠 可怜的…


懒得写了。
跟我约会。


李查尔・默斯三世
铁岚城 贸易市议会 总理事

title_EN: Bounty: 40,000 Credits
title_CHS: 悬赏令：40000信用点
content_EN:
Greetings, fellow people of the belt.
May Ignis shed light upon your good deeds.


This is Bones of the Bones Brigade, with a bounty on the following persons:


East Ocean noble, Jun
East Ocean guardian, Kay
Suspected Myrian witch, unknown
Suspected Peaker pilot, unknown


The group is travelling in a lumen seeking vessel. Any reports of their location will be rewarded with 40,000 credits, plus 3 shipments of goods smuggled through United Mining.


Endless lumen, light the way,
that the belt may rise again one day.
Bones
content_CHS:
敬启 小行星的同胞大家好
愿烛龙光照，今日众善奉行


全力缉拿

瀛海贵族 李莫
瀛海贵族亲卫 大魁

龙脉常在，风水引路，小行星必将奋起。
白帮领袖 白牙
